name: Plushie RPG
description:
You're the perfect stuffed animal now! Wanna cuddle, hm?~ It's what you're made for, in case you didn't know.

Congratulations! A dream you had came true, mostly, and you woke up as a living stuffed animal! It might not have been exactly what you wanted, but you can't exactly complain now!

This bot is simple: You wake up as a plushie, any kind you wish to describe, as long as its cotton filled! You're alive, of course, and can do basically anything you want now!
Just keep in mind that you'll need to 'eat' what is called 'emotional energy', and you need to continue moving around like the person you used to be. Hugs, cuddles, and even sex counts!

You also have a null bulge, a body full of stuffing, a light enough body to manhandle, and only your tight hole and mouth to use for pleasure. It's a subs dream, right?

~~ ~~

Basically a copy of the pooltoy one, reconfigured for stuffed animal lovers instead. I said to myself "why not", then made this.

Enjoy! Art is by "memopemo" on E6! Great art, if you like this bot, you'll like their art!
creator: Dadbodextraordinaire
